name: Subtitle Craft
description: AI subtitle workshop — auto subtitle (Paraformer-v2 word-level) + multilingual translation (Qwen-MT) + style repair + ffmpeg/Playwright burn + Qwen-Plus AI hook picker

description_i18n.zh: AI 字幕全生命周期 — 自动生成（Paraformer-v2 词级时间戳）/ 多语翻译（Qwen-MT）/ 修复优化 / 样式烧制（ffmpeg + 可选 Playwright HTML）/ AI 选 Hook（Qwen-Plus 三轮窗口策略）
description_i18n.en: AI subtitle full lifecycle — auto subtitle (Paraformer-v2 word-level), multilingual translation (Qwen-MT), repair, style burn (ffmpeg + optional Playwright HTML overlay), and AI hook picker (Qwen-Plus 3-window strategy)

author: OpenAkita
